matches.x: and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. - His mother’s name also was Jerushah, the daughter of Zadok.

Now the rest of the acts of Josiah, and his good deeds, according to that which is written in the law of the Lord, and 27 his acts, first and last, behold, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah.
